summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Chat View with RealGatewayAdapter refactoring. All 13 features tested and working correctly. The Chat view uses MockGatewayAdapter (MOCKED - REACT_APP_USE_MOCK_GATEWAY=true). Event-based flow (onChatEvent subscription) working correctly. All session data is in-memory mock data.
passed_tests: Header shows 'CHAT HISTORY', +New button visible and functional
Mode indicator at bottom shows 'Mock' with green connected dot
Sending message triggers event-based flow - user msg appears optimistically, Kit response arrives via onChatEvent subscription
/new command creates new session, old session in history with outline dot, new session has filled dot
Clicking past session shows read-only mode (no input, 'Viewing past session' banner with 'Back to current' button)
'Back to current' restores input box and switches to current session
⋯ menu with Rename (inline edit with Enter/Escape) and Delete options
Search input filters sessions by title, shows 'No matching chats' when empty
Slash commands /status, /usage tokens, /usage full, /usage off work and update status bar
Delete last session auto-creates a new one
Multiple message exchange maintains conversation history
Regression: Overview, Tasks, Approvals views render correctly (CSS :has(.mc-chat-layout) selector does not affect non-chat views)
critical_code_review_comments: Event-based adapter pattern (onChatEvent subscription) working correctly for mock mode
MockGatewayAdapter properly emits 'complete' events after ~800-1400ms delay
Connection state management working - mock adapter immediately sets 'connected' state
Mode indicator correctly shows 'Mock' when REACT_APP_USE_MOCK_GATEWAY=true
RealGatewayAdapter fully implemented but untestable in preview (needs local OpenClaw gateway)
CSS :has(.mc-chat-layout) selector correctly scopes chat-specific styles without affecting other views
seed_data_creation: MockGatewayAdapter starts with one session titled 'Current chat'. Test sessions created during testing are in-memory only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat View with RealGatewayAdapter refactoring fully tested. Uses MockGatewayAdapter in gateway.js (REACT_APP_USE_MOCK_GATEWAY=true) - all chat interactions are MOCKED with event-based pattern. Key data-testids: chat-view, chat-history-sidebar, new-chat-btn, chat-search-input, session-{id}, session-menu-{id}, rename-input-{id}, delete-session-{id}, back-to-current-banner, back-to-current-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn, chat-status-bar, gateway-mode-indicator. New features tested: connection state banner (only in real mode), mode indicator footer, streaming badge. RealGatewayAdapter exists but cannot be tested in preview environment.

mocked_methods: sendMessage - emits 'complete' event via onChatEvent after 800-1400ms delay
createSession - creates new session in memory
renameSession - updates session title in memory
getHistory - returns session messages from memory
getStatus - returns mock status (model, context_pct, tokens, cost)
mocked_apis.real_adapter_status: RealGatewayAdapter fully implemented with WebSocket protocol v3, but untestable in preview (needs local OpenClaw gateway at ws://127.0.0.1:18888)
